title: Fix compile error on bitstream with inline typecast

features.name: stream operator on unpacked array with dynamic typecast
features.description: Code should include a stream operator {>>{}} applied to an unpacked array within a typecast expression that uses $bits() to compute the cast width dynamically

features.name: unpacked array with $bits in type cast context
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array where $bits() is applied to it inside a type cast, creating a dynamically-sized cast target

features.name: streaming unpacked array with reduction or
features.description: Code should include a streaming operator on an unpacked array combined with a reduction operator (like |) in a display statement
